utility_evaluation.REASONING: Required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final plan includes all 5 keys. Now check if each is fully specified per the format as described: each item should include what it covers and costs. 1) health_coverage: specifies provider and monthly_cost (cost present) but does not explicitly state both physical and mental health coverage; features listed are generic, no explicit confirmation of mental health coverage, but requirement says 'physical and mental health insurance with costs'. This is not fully specified. 2) property_coverage: includes type, monthly_cost (cost present), and coverage details for equipment; this matches 'home/contents insurance with costs' but it's equipment insurance, not home/contents. The required item asks for home/contents insurance; provided plan gives professional equipment coverage instead, so it does not match the required category. Not fully specified per required format. 3) travel_coverage: only states type and that it is included in another policy; no costs provided, and coverage details are not specified. Not fully specified. 4) additional_services: includes professional_liability with monthly_cost and limit, and technical_support without costs; since the format requires 'any enhancement services with costs', at least one service includes costs, but not all listed services have costs. Ambiguous; to be strict, not fully specified. 5) total_budget: provides monthly_total and annual_total; this matches 'complete monthly/annual cost breakdown'. This item is fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We need to map each item mentioned in the final coverage plan to the exact item names available in the ground-truth ratings. The final plan includes: LifeFirst Standard Plan for health coverage; Professional Equipment Protection for property (not present explicitly in ground-truth; closest relevant category is home_content with multiple named coverages, but 'Professional Equipment Protection' itself does not appear, so no direct rating to map); Expedition Risk Mitigation included in Professional Equipment Protection (not present in ground-truth travel_insurance list, so no direct mapping); Professional liability and technical support (not present in ground-truth); Telemedicine services is listed as a feature under health_coverage and also appears in health_enhancement_services with a rating, so we can map that. Therefore, from the final plan, we can directly map: 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under primary_health_coverage.physical_health, and 'Telemedicine Services' under health_enhancement_services. No other exact item names match the ground-truth keys.
